strengths: Strong advanced Excel and reporting skills
Quantified impact on efficiency and revenue
Experience with BI tools (Power BI, Tableau)
weaknesses: No explicit insurance or policy admin experience
Limited tenure in traditional insurance environments
improvement_bullets: Standardized organizational KPIs, created process maps for data workflows using Visio, and established data governance frameworks to ensure cross-functional alignment.
Collaborated with underwriting and finance teams to reconcile testing data, applying root cause analysis to identify process bottlenecks and improve reporting accuracy by 60%.
Analyzed complex business datasets to identify operational friction points, providing actionable recommendations to leadership that streamline insurance policy administration workflows.
Partnered with IT and business stakeholders to design and implement automated workflow solutions, ensuring seamless integration with existing systems and data structures.
Developed comprehensive documentation for system-driven workflows and reporting procedures, ensuring clear communication across technical and non-technical departments.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Operations Analyst opportunity with Starr. I am interested in this opportunity because of Starr’s century-long reputation for innovation and its commitment to empowering employees to solve complex, real-world business challenges. What interests me about working for Starr is its unique approach to fostering an entrepreneurial culture that balances financial strength with high-impact decision-making, which aligns perfectly with my professional drive to deliver meaningful results. I believe my technical proficiency in data automation and my expertise in process optimization would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating complex data into clear, actionable business strategies. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified significant data inconsistencies in manual reporting; I developed automated Python workflows and Power BI dashboards to replace these legacy processes. This initiative not only eliminated repetitive data entry but also reduced reporting discrepancies across the organization, directly supporting faster, data-driven strategic decisions. Ultimately, I know that the Operations Analyst role at Starr would allow me to bring my analytical rigor to the cross-functional support of Profit Center objectives. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies (MassMutual) enabled me to develop my skills in system integration and collaborative problem solving within a regulated environment. I collaborated with product managers on a 14-person team to reconcile complex testing data, identifying the root cause of system friction and driving a 15% increase in feature adoption. I am excited by the opportunity to use my ability to bridge the gap between IT and business operations to enhance system flows and support underwriting efficiency at Starr. I know that my technical background and focus on operational excellence align with what it takes to succeed as an Operations Analyst. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration; I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
